description: Reports of items returned damaged, shrunk, stained, or discolored requiring facility review.

scenarios.customer_message: My shirt came back shrunk and I can't wear it anymore.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry to hear that. Could you share your order ID and a photo of the item so our team can review it?

scenarios.customer_message: There's a new stain on my dress that wasn't there before cleaning.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry about that. Please share your order ID and a photo of the stain so our team can look into it.

scenarios.customer_message: My jacket has a tear on the sleeve that happened at your facility.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm really sorry to hear this. Could you send your order ID and a photo of the tear so our team can review it?

scenarios.customer_message: The colors bled and now my white towels are pink.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry for the trouble. Please share your order ID and a photo of the towels so our team can look into it.
